untranslatable_reason: The Eve & Eve double bottom pattern requires detection of two distinct rounded bottoms with specific morphological properties (width, roundedness, separation distance, rounding climb between them). These characteristics cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Previous Bar, Returns, Bar Props). Pattern recognition of this complexity requires candlestick pattern detection logic or custom multi-bar shape analysis not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal references a classic charting pattern that requires visual/morphological analysis of price structure over multiple bars. The entry logic fundamentally depends on identifying rounded bottoms and their separation characteristics, which are not quantifiable through standard technical indicators. Recommend implementing this as a separate pattern recognition module or using machine learning-based shape detection rather than rule-based indicators.
